name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BakeryMutex ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANT N

(* Process identifiers *)
VARIABLES turn, state

(* State values *)
Idle == 0
Trying == 1
Critical == 2

(* Initial state: all processes idle, no turn assigned *)
Init == /\ turn = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> Idle]

(* Helper: set of processes currently in critical section *)
InCritical == {i \in 1..N : state[i] = Critical}

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == Len(InCritical) <= 1

(* Process i attempts to enter critical section *)
Enter(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = Idle
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Trying]
  /\ turn' = [turn EXCEPT ![i] = Max({turn[j] : j \in 1..N}) + 1]

(* Process i selects the process with the smallest ticket to enter *)
SelectSeq(i) ==
  LET minTicket == Min({turn[j] : j \in 1..N})
  IN /\ state[i] = Trying
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = IF turn[i] = minTicket THEN Critical ELSE Idle]
     /\ UNCHANGED turn

(* Process i exits critical section *)
Exit(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = Critical
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Idle]
  /\ UNCHANGED turn

(* Next-state relation: any process may attempt, select, or exit *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    Enter(i) \/ SelectSeq(i) \/ Exit(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

(* Each participant is identified by a natural number in 1..N *)
VARIABLES state, vote

(* State of each participant: "Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
StateSet == {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Vote of each participant: "Yes", "No" *)
VoteSet == {"Yes", "No"}

Init == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ vote = [p \in Participants |-> "Yes"]

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
Prepare == /\ \A p \in Participants: state[p] = "Init"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared" \forall p \in Participants]

(* Participants respond with VoteYes or VoteNo *)
VoteResponse(p, v) == /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
                    /\ vote' = [vote EXCEPT ![p] = v]
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed" \iff v = "Yes"]

(* Coordinator decides to Commit if all votes are Yes *)
CommitDecision == /\ \A p \in Participants: vote[p] = "Yes"
                  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed" \forall p \in Participants]

(* Coordinator decides to Abort if any vote is No *)
AbortDecision == /\ \E p \in Participants: vote[p] = "No"
                  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted" \forall p \in Participants]

Next == Prepare
        \/ \E p \in Participants: VoteResponse(p, "Yes")
        \/ \E p \in Participants: VoteResponse(p, "No")
        \/ CommitDecision
        \/ AbortDecision

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, vote>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Define the set of philosophers and forks *)
Philosophers == 1..N
Forks == 1..N

(* Helper to get the left and right fork for a philosopher *)
LeftFork(i) == i
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES state, forks

(* State can be "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" for each philosopher *)
State == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking and all forks are free *)
Init == /\ state \in [Philosophers -> State]
        /\ forks = [f \in Forks |-> TRUE]

(* Predicate: philosopher i can start eating (both forks free) *)
CanEat(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ forks[RightFork(i)]

(* Action: philosopher i picks up both forks and starts eating *)
PickUp(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = FALSE, ![RightFork(i)] = FALSE]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down both forks after eating *)
PutDown(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = TRUE, ![RightFork(i)] = TRUE]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry (ready to eat) *)
Think(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "thinking"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  /\ forks' = forks

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can transition *)
Next ==
  \E i \in Philosophers :
    PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i) \/ Think(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, forks>>

(* Invariant: no two adjacent philosophers eat simultaneously *)
NoAdjacentEating ==
  \A i \in Philosophers :
    state[i] = "eating" => state[IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1] # "eating"

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are indices modulo K, size is the number of elements *)

Init == 
    /\ q = << >>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer ==
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* produce a 1
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED head

Consumer ==
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* consume the first element
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* Number of servers, NULL, Subset

(* Server identifiers *)
Servers == 1..N

(* Majority threshold *)
Majority == (N \div 2) + 1

(* Server states *)
State == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, hasn, s, server

(* Initial state: all servers are followers with term 0 and no votes *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = [s \in Servers |-> 0]
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]

(* Helper: a server has won the election if it has a majority of votes *)
HasWon(s) == \E votes \in Subset(Servers) :
                /\ votes \subseteq {s' \in Servers : votedFor[s'] = s}
                /\ Cardinality(votes) >= Majority

(* Transition: a server steps up as a candidate *)
StepCandidate(s) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Follower"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
  /\ currentTerm' = [currentTerm EXCEPT ![s] = currentTerm[s] + 1]
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]

(* Transition: a server grants a vote if it hasn't voted yet in the current term *)
GrantVote(s, c) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Follower"
  /\ votedFor[s] = NULL
  /\ currentTerm[s] = currentTerm[c]
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = c]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Transition: a server becomes leader if it has a majority of votes *)
StepLeader(s) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
  /\ HasWon(s)
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* All possible transitions for a single step *)
Next ==
  \E s \in Servers :
    \E action \in {StepCandidate, GrantVote, StepLeader} :
      action(s) \/ \E c \in Servers : GrantVote(s, c)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Invariant: each server's term is non-negative *)
TypeOK == \A s \in Servers : currentTerm[s] \in Nat

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* readers: set of reader IDs currently reading
   writer_active: 0 if no writer, 1 if a writer is active *)

Init == /\ readers = {}
        /\ writer_active = 0

(* Reader i starts reading if no writer is active *)
ReadStart(i) == 
  /\ i \in 1..N
  /\ writer_active = 0
  /\ readers' = readers \cup {i}
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Reader i stops reading *)
ReadStop(i) == 
  /\ i \in readers
  /\ readers' = readers \ {i}
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Writer starts writing if no readers or writer *)
WriteStart == 
  /\ writer_active = 0
  /\ readers = {}
  /\ writer_active' = 1
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

(* Writer stops writing *)
WriteStop == 
  /\ writer_active = 1
  /\ writer_active' = 0
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N: ReadStart(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: ReadStop(i)
        \/ WriteStart
        \/ WriteStop

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

(* Invariants *)
TypeOK == /\ readers \subseteq 1..N
          /\ writer_active \in {0,1}
          /\ (writer_active = 1 => \A i \in readers: FALSE)

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Proc, Chan

(* Each process has a set of outgoing channels *)
OUT(ch) == {c \in Chan : [src |-> ch, dst |-> c] \in Chan}

(* State of each process: a counter *)
VARIABLES state, rec, chan

(* Initial state: all counters zero, no recordings, empty channels *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ rec = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]
        /\ chan = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]

(* Sending a message increments the counter and appends to channel *)
Send(ch, m) == 
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![ch] = @ + 1]
  /\ chan' = [chan EXCEPT ![ch] = Append(@, m)]

(* Receiving a message from channel *)
Recv(ch, m) == 
  /\ chan' = [chan EXCEPT ![ch] = Tail(@)]
  /\ UNCHANGED state

(* Marker propagation: if a process has recorded, it sends markers on all outgoing channels *)
Marker(ch) == 
  /\ rec[ch] = TRUE
  /\ \A c \in OUT(ch) : Append(chan[c], "marker") \in chan

(* Process step: either send, receive, or record *)
Step == 
  \E ch \in Proc :
    \E m \in {"msg", "marker"} :
      \E c \in Chan :
        \/ (m = "msg" /\ Send(ch, m))
        \/ (m = "marker" /\ Marker(ch))

Next == Step

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, rec, chan>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N \* Number of nodes

VARIABLES token, sent

(* Token is the index of the node that currently holds the token.
   sent is a set of messages that have been sent. *)

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ sent = {}

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ token' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1
    /\ sent' = sent \cup {i}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, sent>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

(* State variables *)
VARIABLE store

(* Predicate that the state is well-formed *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Initial state: all keys map to a distinguished initial value *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

(* Action: Put operation *)
Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
              /\ v \in Values
              /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Action: Get operation (does not change state) *)
Get(k) == /\ k \in Keys
          /\ UNCHANGED <<store>>

(* Next-state relation: any Put or Get can occur *)
Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v) \/ Get(k)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

(* Invariant: the store always maps keys to values *)
Inv == \A k \in Keys: store[k] \in Values

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, M, V, NULL

(* Ballot numbers are natural numbers *)
Ballot == Nat

(* State of each acceptor: ballot and accepted value *)
VARIABLES aBallot, aValue, pBallot, pValue

(* Proposer state: current ballot and proposed value *)

(* Helper to check if all acceptors have accepted a value *)
AllAccepted(v) == \A i \in 1..N : aValue[i] = v

(* Initial state: all ballots 0, no value chosen *)
Init == /\ aBallot = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ aValue = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ pBallot = 0
        /\ pValue = NULL

(* Prepare phase: proposer chooses a new ballot *)
Prepare == 
  /\ pBallot' = pBallot + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<aBallot, aValue>>

(* Promise: acceptors accept the highest ballot seen *)
Promise ==
  /\ aBallot' = [i \in 1..N |-> Max(aBallot[i], pBallot)]
  /\ UNCHANGED pValue

(* Accept phase: proposer proposes a value *)
Accept ==
  /\ pValue' = CHOOSE v \in V : TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED <<aBallot, pValue>>

(* Accepted: acceptors accept the proposed value if ballot matches *)
Accepted ==
  /\ aValue' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF aBallot[i] = pBallot THEN pValue ELSE aValue[i]]
  /\ UNCHANGED aBallot

(* One step of the protocol *)
Next == Prepare \/ Promise \/ Accept \/ Accepted

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<aBallot, aValue, pBallot, pValue>>

(* Invariant: once a value is chosen, it is never changed *)
TypeOK == \A i \in 1..N : aBallot[i] \in Nat /\ aValue[i] \in V \cup {NULL}

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
\* Import basic temporal logic
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, FiniteSets

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* CONSTANTS
\*   MAX_RETRIES   -- maximum number of retransmission attempts per chunk
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT MAX_RETRIES

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* VARIABLES
\*   sent      -- set of chunks that have been sent (including retransmits)
\*   acked     -- set of chunks that have been acknowledged
\*   retries   -- mapping from chunk -> number of retransmission attempts
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES sent, acked, retries

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper definitions
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* All chunks in the file (assume file size is 1..N)
FileSize == 10
AllChunks == 1..FileSize

\* A chunk is considered successfully transmitted if it has been
\* acknowledged at least once.
Successful(chunk) == chunk \in acked

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Init state
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ sent = {}
    /\ acked = {}
    /\ retries = [c \in AllChunks |-> 0]

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Next-state relation
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The sender may attempt to send any chunk that has not yet been
\* successfully transmitted.  The channel is unreliable: the
\* transmission may or may not reach the receiver.  The sender
\* records the attempt and increments the retransmission counter.
Send(chunk) ==
    /\ chunk \in AllChunks
    /\ ~Successful(chunk)
    /\ sent' = sent \cup {chunk}
    /\ retries' = [retries EXCEPT ![chunk] = retries[chunk] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED acked

\* The receiver may acknowledge any chunk that has been sent.
Ack(chunk) ==
    /\ chunk \in sent
    /\ acked' = acked \cup {chunk}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, retries>>

\* The sender may give up on a chunk after exceeding the retry limit.
GiveUp(chunk) ==
    /\ retries[chunk] >= MAX_RETRIES
    /\ ~Successful(chunk)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, acked, retries>>

Next ==
    \E chunk \in AllChunks :
        Send(chunk) \/ Ack(chunk) \/ GiveUp(chunk)

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Temporal specification
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, acked, retries>>

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Invariant: no chunk is retransmitted more than MAX_RETRIES times
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
TypeOK ==
    /\ sent \subseteq AllChunks
    /\ acked \subseteq AllChunks
    /\ \A c \in AllChunks : retries[c] \in 0..MAX_RETRIES

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Liveness property: every chunk is eventually acknowledged or
\* the sender gives up on it.
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Progress ==
    \A c \in AllChunks :
        (Successful(c) \/ (retries[c] >= MAX_RETRIES))

====
